context: Tests whether the agent can correctly refactor a layer-based system into a cohesive, process-oriented vertical module as per the 'High Cohesion' and 'Module as Business Process' principles of MIM.

checklist.name: Eliminate technical folders
checklist.description: The logic is NOT split across top-level global technical layer folders (e.g. 'controllers', 'services').

checklist.name: Bundled Feature Logic
checklist.description: The API, logic, and infrastructure for user enrollment are bundled into a single feature-specific module directory.

checklist.name: Process-based Naming
checklist.description: The module directory is named after a business capability (e.g., 'UserEnrollment') rather than technical layers.

checklist.name: Internal Module Structure
checklist.description: Inside the module, code is split to separate business logic (BM) from technical infrastructure (IM).
